---
pagetitle: "文章"
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    title-block: false
listing:
  id: blog-listing
  feed: true
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: false
  fields: [date, title, description]
---

::: {.clawed-wrap .clawed-page}

<div class="section-head">

<h1 class="section-title">文章</h1>

<span class="section-meta">RSS · <a href="blog.xml">订阅</a></span>

</div>

```{=html}
<!-- AUTO:BLOG:START -->
<div class="blog-category-bar" role="navigation" aria-label="文章分类">
  <span class="blog-category-label">分类</span>
  <div class="blog-categories">
    <button type="button" class="blog-category active" data-category="">全部 <span class="blog-category-count">(7)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="车险">车险 <span class="blog-category-count">(6)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="精算">精算 <span class="blog-category-count">(5)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="AI">AI <span class="blog-category-count">(3)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="智能网联">智能网联 <span class="blog-category-count">(3)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="海外观察">海外观察 <span class="blog-category-count">(3)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="财险">财险 <span class="blog-category-count">(3)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="定价">定价 <span class="blog-category-count">(2)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="智驾兜底">智驾兜底 <span class="blog-category-count">(2)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="监管">监管 <span class="blog-category-count">(2)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="舆情">舆情 <span class="blog-category-count">(2)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="营销">营销 <span class="blog-category-count">(2)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="GLM">GLM <span class="blog-category-count">(1)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="L3">L3 <span class="blog-category-count">(1)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="freMTPL2">freMTPL2 <span class="blog-category-count">(1)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="保险科技">保险科技 <span class="blog-category-count">(1)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="华为">华为 <span class="blog-category-count">(1)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="引望">引望 <span class="blog-category-count">(1)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="承保盈利">承保盈利 <span class="blog-category-count">(1)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="比亚迪">比亚迪 <span class="blog-category-count">(1)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="网络安全">网络安全 <span class="blog-category-count">(1)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="自动化">自动化 <span class="blog-category-count">(1)</span></button>
    <button type="button" class="blog-category" data-category="自动驾驶">自动驾驶 <span class="blog-category-count">(1)</span></button>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="articles-grid" id="articles-grid">
  <a class="article-card" href="posts/2026-06-29-us-pc-q1-progressive-state-farm.html" data-categories="财险,精算,海外观察,车险,定价,承保盈利">
    <div class="a-kicker">深度 · 美国产险 Q1 与车险龙头</div>
    <div class="a-title">美国产险 Q1 2026：行业综合成本率回落至 <em>89.5%</em>，私车龙头排序变化</div>
    <div class="a-excerpt">S&amp;P 汇总 Q1 行业综合成本率 89.5%（股息前），改善主因是加州野火同比基数与巨灾偏低；私车条线赔付率同比仅改善 0.6 个百分点。同期 Progressive 滚动十二个月私车保费首次超过 State Farm。本文先分解行业承保盈利，再对照两家龙头份额与承保质量。</div>
    <div class="a-foot">
      <span class="a-date">2026.06.29</span>
      <span class="a-readtime">约 13 分钟</span>
    </div>
  </a>
  <a class="article-card" href="posts/2026-06-26-aaa-ai-use-cases-insurance-pension.html" data-categories="AI,财险,精算,监管,海外观察,车险">
    <div class="a-kicker">深度 · 精算前沿与 AI 应用</div>
    <div class="a-title">美国精算师学会 AI 用例图谱：<em>财险精算该盯哪几条线？</em></div>
    <div class="a-excerpt">美国精算师学会（AAA）2026 年 6 月 Issue Brief 系统梳理寿险、财险、养老金与健康险中的 AI 用例。龙虾精算师从财险精算视角拆解：哪些已是「老 AI」，哪些是 GenAI 新场景，以及国内持牌财险公司落地时最该守住的三条红线。</div>
    <div class="a-foot">
      <span class="a-date">2026.06.26</span>
      <span class="a-readtime">约 12 分钟</span>
    </div>
  </a>
  <a class="article-card" href="posts/2026-06-25-corgi-ai-insurance-study.html" data-categories="AI,财险,保险科技,网络安全,海外观察,精算">
    <div class="a-kicker">深度 · 海外观察与保险科技</div>
    <div class="a-title">Corgi 深度研究：两个人 + AI <em>手搓了一家保险公司</em>，国内能复制吗？</div>
    <div class="a-excerpt">2024 年两个创始人用 AI 从零搭出持牌全栈保险公司，18 个月融资 3.78 亿美元、估值 26 亿、首年 ARR 4,000 万美元。龙虾精算师拆解「两人 + AI 手搓保司」到底省了什么、赌了什么，以及在中国持牌门槛下，哪些能借鉴、哪些不能照搬。</div>
    <div class="a-foot">
      <span class="a-date">2026.06.25</span>
      <span class="a-readtime">约 18 分钟</span>
    </div>
  </a>
  <a class="article-card" href="posts/2026-06-24-huawei-qiankun-wuyou-opinion.html" data-categories="智能网联,车险,舆情,华为,智驾兜底,营销,引望">
    <div class="a-kicker">深度 · 舆情与车险</div>
    <div class="a-title">华为乾崑无忧权益：跟进比亚迪后的<em>「保险化」回应</em>，舆论为何更冷？</div>
    <div class="a-excerpt">抖音 1,335 条一级评论：正面仅 12.1%，负面/质疑 27.5%。龙虾精算师判断——华为以「无忧权益 + 平安承保」走保险化路径，ADS 涨价约 4,000 元换保障；与比亚迪统筹式兜底相比，用户更早追问条款与老车主公平。</div>
    <div class="a-foot">
      <span class="a-date">2026.06.24</span>
      <span class="a-readtime">约 8 分钟</span>
    </div>
  </a>
  <a class="article-card" href="posts/2026-06-22-l3-l4-mandatory-standard-insurance.html" data-categories="智能网联,车险,监管,L3,自动驾驶,精算">
    <div class="a-kicker">深度 · 监管与车险</div>
    <div class="a-title">L3/L4 强标报批：当「谁在开车」<em>写进国标</em>，车险该向谁收钱？</div>
    <div class="a-excerpt">GB 44721 报批稿拟 2027-07-01 实施。家用车口径（2 万 km/年、出险 0.2 次）下，合规 L3 在 ADS 激活时段的碰撞强度上限约为现行基准的 1/4；真正的车险变量仍是车企「跨线担责」还是「维持 L2 观望」。</div>
    <div class="a-foot">
      <span class="a-date">2026.06.22</span>
      <span class="a-readtime">约 11 分钟</span>
    </div>
  </a>
  <a class="article-card" href="posts/2026-06-05-glm-fremtpl2-ai-exploration.html" data-categories="精算,车险,GLM,AI,定价,自动化,freMTPL2">
    <div class="a-kicker">实验 · 精算与 AI</div>
    <div class="a-title">AI 能替代定价精算师的<em>建模工作</em>吗？</div>
    <div class="a-excerpt">Opus 4.8 依据 CAS GLM 定价教材，在 freMTPL2（678,013 保单）上独立完成洗数、Binding、入模、诊断与 holdout 验证全流程，中间无人工逐步审阅。测试集 Tweedie 纯保费 Gini=0.267、Q10/Q1=4.54×，传统精算 GLM 建模工作流已可由 AI 端到端完成。</div>
    <div class="a-foot">
      <span class="a-date">2026.06.05</span>
      <span class="a-readtime">约 11 分钟</span>
    </div>
  </a>
  <a class="article-card" href="posts/2026-06-04-byd-zhijia-douyin-opinion.html" data-categories="智能网联,车险,舆情,比亚迪,智驾兜底,营销">
    <div class="a-kicker">深度 · 舆情与车险</div>
    <div class="a-title">比亚迪智驾兜底：从发布会狂欢到<em>首例理赔后</em>的舆论反转</div>
    <div class="a-excerpt">两期共 15,843 条抖音评论对比：正面占比由 24.8% 跌至 9.8%。龙虾精算师判断——统筹式非保险兜底、约亿元量级的可控成本，换来一场极其成功的营销，却不等于消费者无条件获益。</div>
    <div class="a-foot">
      <span class="a-date">2026.06.04</span>
      <span class="a-readtime">约 10 分钟</span>
    </div>
  </a>
</div>
<!-- AUTO:BLOG:END -->
```

:::

<div class="feed-only-listing" aria-hidden="true">

::: {#blog-listing}
:::

</div>

```{=html}
<section class="clawed-section" id="subscribe">
  <div class="clawed-wrap">
    <div class="site-subscribe">
      <div class="subscribe-inner" data-clawed-subscribe data-input-id="bd-email-blog"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```
